This is a 'buy the new regime' moment with clear sector beneficiaries: clean energy, financials, materials, and infrastructure. The primary risk is that overbought conditions in cyclicals (GS RSI=81, FCX RSI=84) mean near-term pullbacks are possible even in a bull trend.

Retail trading volumes are orders of magnitude above historical norms. Reddit is coordinating millions of retail investors in real-time. This validates the structural shift toward digital-first financial platforms at a scale we couldn't have anticipated. SoFi, Robinhood, and similar platforms are now critical market infrastructure. Incrementing conviction.

lessons: Social media-driven retail coordination (Reddit/WallStreetBets) creates asymmetric short-squeeze risk. When a ticker accumulates mass retail attention (rising Reddit mentions, high short interest, options activity spiking), heavily shorted positions face violent cover risk regardless of fundamental thesis. Before entering any short position, screen for: (1) short interest >20% of float, (2) options implied volatility spike, (3) Reddit/social media mention velocity. If all three are elevated, avoid or wait. Trigger condition: before opening any short → check short interest and social mention trends → if short interest >20% AND social buzz high, wait or reduce size significantly.

The Webull CEO appearing to discuss Dogecoin trading on 'Power Hour' and the crypto investment firm rushing to go public in May further confirm this is a speculative peak dynamic, not structural adoption momentum. The underlying digital finance thesis (democratization of financial services, DeFi, digital payments) remains structurally valid, but the speculative froth overlay justifies reducing conviction one notch. We are also closing SOFI — the portfolio's primary Digital Finance expression — due to institutional distribution. Decrement from 5/5 to 4/5.

lessons: When retail speculation reaches absurdist extremes — meme assets surpassing major real-economy companies in market cap, non-fundamental assets dominating financial news cycles — this is a peak-retail-euphoria signal for the broader speculative complex. Structurally valid themes (digital finance, crypto infrastructure) remain intact, but high-beta, sentiment-driven expressions of those themes become vulnerable to sharp reversions as retail flows reverse. Trigger condition: meme/speculative asset achieves market cap parity with a major S&P 500 company OR dominates financial news for 3+ consecutive days on non-fundamental drivers → review and reduce exposure to highest-beta, most retail-sentiment-correlated positions within the theme, even if the structural thesis is unbroken.

The underlying principle — that mass retail attention on non-fundamental narratives creates extreme asymmetric risk — is confirmed and strengthened. Incrementing from 1 to 2.

Ford's ongoing chip shortage remains industry-wide (GM, Stellantis, and Toyota all facing the same wafer constraints) which per Lesson 5 means the competitive moat is intact. The lesson holds. Incrementing from 1 to 2 as the Ford situation provided another real-world test case.

belief_updates.name: Macro Regime Shifts Create Predictable Sector Rotations
belief_updates.description: Major macro catalysts — political trifectas, rapid yield cycle inflections, large-scale fiscal programs — create mechanical and directional sector rotations that are identifiable in advance and act within defined timeframes. Political regime changes (Senate flip, presidential transition) immediately activate the new government's policy priorities as investable themes: clean energy, infrastructure, fiscal-sensitive sectors move first and fast within 1-2 weeks. Rapid Treasury yield increases (>40bps over 4-6 weeks) mechanically compress high-PE growth multiples and trigger institutional rotation into energy, banks, and materials — regardless of whether the underlying growth thesis remains valid. These rotations are predictable precisely because they are structural and institutional: fund mandates, risk models, and macro overlays force the rotation. Position ahead of the catalyst, not after the narrative saturates. Once a rotation is widely discussed in financial media, the easy money has been made.

belief_updates.name: Institutional Positioning Is Readable Through Technical Flows
belief_updates.description: Institutional accumulation and distribution are visible in real time through a three-factor technical framework before price confirms the move. Accumulation signal (entry): ADX >40 + MACD bullish + OBV rising simultaneously — institutions are building positions; this is the highest-probability entry signal we have identified. Distribution signal (exit): MACD bearish + OBV falling simultaneously, even while above SMA50 — this is the WARNING stage; institutions are exiting before price breaks. Below SMA50 is CONFIRMATION, not the first signal. The critical distinction between a dip and a breakdown: OBV rising during a pullback means institutions are buying (hold); OBV falling during a pullback means institutions are exiting (sell within 1-2 cycles). This framework has been confirmed across six position entries (NUE, UNH, HD, ISRG, CVS, BLK) and two exits (MSFT, HD). Apply to every position at every review cycle.
